The main claim is: Thus, there are two major differences here between AI safety via market making and AI safety via debate: first, we get an overseer—Amp(M)—and second, we get to do per-step myopia verification rather than per-episode myopia verification.
While it might seem like such modifications are unique to AI safety via debate, in fact AI safety via market making is similar enough that we can modify it to include such additional components.
